title: tragacantha boetica
intro: Tragacantha boetica, also known as Lesser Burnet or Petty Spurge, is a perennial plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating skin irritations, wounds, and inflammation. The plant's sap and extracts have been known to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including soothing burns, reducing swelling, and promoting wound healing. Tragacantha boetica can be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, salves, and infusions, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
